dream_chest.title: Loot 3 unique Beyond the Dream chests — collect rare materials exclusive to the dimension

subtitle.text: You thought Beyond the Dream was a destination. It is a direction. The loot is in the depth.

description: CH.13 · THE DREAM GOES DEEPER
▸ Beyond the Dream has depth.
You passed through the initial layer in Ch13.
The deeper structures hold materials not found elsewhere.
Echo Shards — normally only in Ancient Cities —
appear in True End structure chests.
This is the only renewable Echo Shard source late-game.
◈ DEEP LOOT STRATEGY
└ True End structures generate in clusters
(explore in spirals from entry point, not straight lines)
└ Chest types: standard loot tables + True End exclusives
└ Echo Shards: required for Recovery Compass + Ch14 recipes
└ Unique drops: check JEI for True End exclusive item uses
└ Mob difficulty scales with structure depth
(surface structures = easier; deep clusters = full difficulty)
◈ ECHO SHARD USES
└ Recovery Compass: tracks your last death location
(8 Echo Shards + Compass = Recovery Compass)
Essential: End void deaths lose all inventory
Recovery Compass tells you EXACTLY where you died
└ Ch14 crafting: End's Delight Dragon Egg Research
and advanced recipes may require Echo Shards
└ ISS Eldritch school: ancienttome recipes use Shard
(check Immersive Enchanting + Eldritch school interaction)
◈ RECOVERY COMPASS PRIORITY
└ If you die in the End: pearls, Elytra, and Chorus can be lost
└ Recovery Compass locates your last death in same dimension
└ Pair with a Shulker Box loadout near your farm base
so you can resupply at the death site if you retrieve items
└ Craft this before Ch14 deep-End expedition begins
▸ The Echo Shard holds sound.
The sounds of the dimension it was found in.
In the Ancient City it holds screaming.
In the True End it holds something quieter.
Something that was said once, in the dark,
by something that expected no one would ever find it.
▶ Loot 3 unique Beyond the Dream chests [check]
▶ Collect 8 Echo Shards
◇ Echo Shards feed directly into Ch14 progression.
Recovery Compass is a life-insurance item for End players.
Craft it before leaving the True End.
Losing Elytra to a void death without it
is the kind of setback that ends runs.
